Name: insertUsers
SQL: WITH check_mutation_result AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::uuid AS "id", $2::text AS "display_name", $3::citext AS "email", $4::bool AS "disabled", $5::text AS "default_role", $6::varchar AS "locale", $7::text AS "phone_number" UNION ALL SELECT $8::uuid AS "id", $9::text AS "display_name", $10::citext AS "email", $11::bool AS "disabled", $12::text AS "default_role", $13::varchar AS "locale", NULL::text AS "phone_number") AS data WHERE true), mutation_result AS (INSERT INTO "auth"."users" ("id", "display_name", "email", "disabled", "default_role", "locale", "phone_number") SELECT check_mutation_result."id", check_mutation_result."display_name", check_mutation_result."email", check_mutation_result."disabled", check_mutation_result."default_role", check_mutation_result."locale", check_mutation_result."phone_number" FROM check_mutation_result RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id", mutation_result."display_name" AS "displayName", mutation_result."phone_number" AS "phoneNumber", mutation_result."avatar_url" AS "avatarUrl" FROM mutation_result) AS "_e"))
